summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ScanSavvy landing page updates. All polished design elements are working perfectly including original logo, new headline, store logos section, phone mockup, and existing functionality.
passed_tests: Original ScanSavvy logo displays in header (not SVG icon)
Favicon uses the ScanSavvy logo correctly
Hero headline shows 'All Your Coupons. One QR Code.'
Hero subtext mentions 'scan once and save'
Hero badge shows 'Over $2M saved by ScanSavvy users'
Store logos section displays Walmart, Target, Kroger, CVS, Walgreens, Costco, Publix, Aldi, +12 more
Phone mockup shows Target QR code preview with $24.50 savings
Floating notification appears with weekly coupons message ($47.25 in savings)
How It Works section has 3 steps with cards
Onboarding flow works completely (3 steps, store selection, preferences)
Dashboard displays coupon bundles correctly (3 bundles with $172.00+ total savings)
Backend API - All 14 endpoints working (100% pass rate)
User creation, store selection, manufacturer coupons, notification methods all functional
